title: Hegseth Removes Top General Amid Iran War

charlotte_impact: Leadership changes during wartime can significantly impact military operations and strategic decision-making, raising concerns about stability.

title: Pam Bondi's Contentious Exit from Administration
summary: Pam Bondi's departure was not as graceful as she hoped, highlighting internal conflicts within the Trump administration.
